distance_km.note: No web sources mention a cross-country ski race called 'Daegwallyeong Snow Festival Race' or provide details on distance. Results describe the general Daegwallyeong Snow Festival with activities like snow sculptures and sledding, but no specific ski race info.

elevation_m.note: No information found on elevation gain for any ski race at the festival.

country.note: While sources confirm Daegwallyeong Snow Festival is in South Korea[1][3][6], no specific cross-country ski race is mentioned.

region.note: Sources place the festival in Gangwon-do/Pyeongchang[1][3][6], but no ski race details.

discipline.note: No sources reference classic, skate, or any ski disciplines for a race.

field_size.note: No participant numbers for any race found.

founded.note: Sources indicate the Snow Festival started in 1993[2][3][5], but no ski race founded in 2019 mentioned.

official_website.note: Festival website listed as www.snowfestival.net[3][4], but no race-specific site or confirmation of race existence.

race_date.note: Festival held in January[1][2][3], sometimes early February tours, but no race dates.
